title.en: Establish and Maintain a Secure Configuration Process

prose.en: Establish and maintain a documented secure configuration process for enterprise assets (end-user devices, including portable and mobile, non-computing/IoT devices, and servers) and software (operating systems and applications). Review and update documentation annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.

A documented secure configuration process is established and maintained for enterprise assets (end-user devices, including portable and mobile, non-computing/IoT devices, and servers) and software (operating systems and applications).
Documentation is reviewed and updated annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
